creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
(In reply to Lorenzo Salvadore from comment #2)

I often - shame to admit that - 'pointlessly create' problems by not doing things 'the right way' so I created this PR to make sure that this time not I fucked up and maybe there is some problem with 'lang/gcc12' currently.

Seems its on me again.

I was able to workaround that with help from here:
- https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/issues/1067


This patch helped to omit 'lang/gcc12' building:
- https://github.com/freebsd/poudriere/pull/1064/commits/6b3aa54c1e48109a83d4443a341f7e4d7e098e36

So I am closing this one, as some others also reported (besides official packages) that 'lang/gcc12' builds properly:
- https://twitter.com/vmisev/status/1686399318054354944

Regards,
vermaden
